query:
insert or ignore into RequirementContents (
                    hash,
                    req_details_hash,
                    req_properties_hash,
                    req_hierarchies_hash,
                    manual_verification,
                    deprecated
                )
                values (
                    $1,
                    $2,
                    $3,
                    $4,
                    $5,
                    $6
                )
